hero.eyebrow: Your Trusted China Online Shopping Solution Agent
hero.description: Paste a product link or search keywords. CNSnap helps you buy from China, inspect items, store parcels, and ship them worldwide.

why.title: Why Choose CNSnap?
why.description: A simple purchasing flow with secure payment, warehouse quality control, free storage, and fast customer support.

pasteLink.title: Paste Link
pasteLink.description: Drop any China marketplace product URL or search by keyword.

wePurchase.title: We Purchase
wePurchase.description: Agent confirms product, variant, domestic shipping, and pays seller.

qcWarehouse.title: QC Warehouse
qcWarehouse.description: Items arrive at warehouse for photos, storage, and consolidation.

shipGlobal.title: Ship Global
shipGlobal.description: Choose route, submit parcel, and track international delivery.

expertSourcing.title: Expert Sourcing
expertSourcing.description: Can’t find it? Submit a DIY request and let an agent source it.

shippingCalculator.title: Shipping Calculator
shippingCalculator.description: Compare routes before purchasing and avoid surprise costs.

parcelConsolidation.title: Parcel Consolidation
parcelConsolidation.description: Combine multiple orders into one smart international parcel.

riskReview.title: Risk Review
riskReview.description: Restricted categories get manual review before shipment.

solutions.title: CNSnap solutions for buying and shipping from China
solutions.description: Use one workflow to purchase from Chinese marketplaces, consolidate parcels, request sourcing help, and estimate international shipping before you pay.

shoppingAgent.title: Shopping agent service
shoppingAgent.description: Buy from Taobao, Tmall, 1688, Weidian, and other China marketplaces with one CNSnap workflow.

forwarding.title: Forwarding and parcel consolidation
forwarding.description: Ship to the CNSnap warehouse, combine parcels, and choose the delivery route that fits your budget and timeline.

sourcing.title: Expert sourcing support
sourcing.description: Need supplier help, bulk buying, or a custom order? Let our team handle sourcing, follow-up, and communication for you.

estimation.title: Shipping cost planning
estimation.description: Estimate delivery fees before checkout so you can compare routes, control costs, and plan orders more confidently.

purchaseOrders.title: Purchase orders
purchaseOrders.description: Paste a product link or send a request to CNSnap and our team will confirm the item, options, pricing, and seller details before purchase.

shipToWarehouse.title: Ship to warehouse
shipToWarehouse.description: Orders from different sellers can arrive at the CNSnap warehouse first, so you can hold, sort, and prepare everything in one place.

qualityCheck.title: Quality check
qualityCheck.description: After arrival, we inspect your items, provide warehouse photos, and help you review condition, quantity, color, and other key details.

globalShipping.title: Global shipping
globalShipping.description: When your parcel is ready, choose your shipping line, submit the package, and track delivery from China to your destination.

multiPlatform.title: Multi-Platform Purchasing
multiPlatform.description: Search by keyword, paste product links, or shop directly from Taobao, Tmall, 1688, and more.

imageSearch.title: Smart image search
imageSearch.description: Upload a photo to find matching items quickly, even when you do not know the original listing language.

warehouseQc.title: Warehouse quality check
warehouseQc.description: Receive detailed item photos before shipping and confirm each order with more confidence.

globalShipping.title: Flexible global shipping
globalShipping.description: Compare air and sea routes with tracking visibility and clear shipping options before checkout.

transparentFees.title: No hidden fees
transparentFees.description: See product, service, and shipping costs more clearly with transparent pricing and multi-currency support.

quickActions.forwarding: Send self-purchased parcels to the warehouse
quickActions.estimation: Check routes and shipping fees before payment
quickActions.cart: Review saved items and continue checkout
quickActions.orders: Track purchase progress and payment status
